source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for testSerialSuite

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select (select t2.c_str from t2 where t2.c_str <= t1.c_str and t2.c_int in (1, 2) order by t2.c_str limit 1) x from t1 order by c_int;").Check(testkit.Rows("a", "a", "a")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select (select t2.c_str from t2 where t2.c_str <= t1.c_str and t2.c_int in (1, 2) order by t2.c_str limit 1) x from t1 order by c_int;").Check(testkit.Rows("a", "a", "a")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates the legacy executor `testSerialSuite` from gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues by adopting modern `testing.T` + testify patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based executor test suites to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select (select t2.c_str from t2 where t2.c_str <= t1.c_str and t2.c_int in (1, 2) order by t2.c_str limit 1) x from t1 order by c_int;").Check(testkit.Rows("a", "a", "a")) (executor/executor_test.go)
